Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ADVANCED_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ADVANCED_TEXT

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ALTERNATE_SCAN; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ALTERNATE_SCAN_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_ALTERNATE_SCAN_TEXT

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_DEBUG; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_DEBUG_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_DEBUG_TOOLTIP_TEXT
